name: Piccalilli
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red Peppers, seeded and chopped
2 medium Green Peppers, seeded and chopped
1 small Head Cabbage, shredded (or 2 cups Cucumber, chopped)
1 cinnamon stick, 1 whole cloves, 1 allspice berry, 1 mustard seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the red and green peppers.
2. Shred the cabbage (or chop the cucumber).
3. Combine all vegetables with salt in a large bowl and let stand overnight.
4. In the morning, drain the mixture, pressing out as much juice as possible.
5. Add vinegar, brown sugar, and spices (tied in a bag) to the vegetable mixture. Bring to a boil and simmer until the vegetables are clear and syrup is thickened.
6. Remove spice bag and pack hot pico de gallo into sterilized jars. Allow to cool before sealing.
7. Makes 8 pints.
